text: Alright team, the hackathon challenge is to build a working API bridge in four hours.
Romeo, I already have a prototype. Let me show you what I sketched during the keynote.
This is brilliant, Mercutio. But look at what Capulet Industries demoed. Their approach to schema translation is cleaner.
What are you doing talking to those Montague people? Juliet, we have our own team for this.
Tybalt, relax. It is a hackathon. We are all here to learn and collaborate.
